title: sessions_to_watch SQL filter silently misses new PaymentState variants
description: db.rs:531-549: sessions_to_watch() filters on SQL string literals 'address_provided' and 'sent'. A future PaymentState variant (e.g. Broadcasting, Confirming) would need to be added to this SQL manually — the compiler cannot enforce exhaustiveness on SQL strings. The payment watcher would silently drop those sessions on restart, causing stuck sessions. Fix: expose a Rust-level function that maps PaymentState to watched/not-watched and build the SQL filter from that, so adding a new variant forces updating the mapping.
